Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Undroidwish – a single-file, batteries-included Tcl/Tk binary for many platforms 66 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. rpg.actor Game Jam 65 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video] 352 upvotes, 59 comments
  4. OpenBSD on Motorola 88000 Processors 41 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. Linux is an interpreter 162 upvotes, 31 comments
  6. Founder of GitLab battles cancer by founding companies 706 upvotes, 168 comments
  7. My heuristics are wrong. What now? 39 upvotes, 5 comments
  8. Meta Partners with Arm to Develop New Class of Data Center Silicon 39 upvotes, 5 comments
  9. Detecting file changes on macOS with kqueue 63 upvotes, 11 comments
  10. CSS is DOOMed 191 upvotes, 50 comments
  11. Spanish legislation as a Git repo 693 upvotes, 213 comments
  12. Cocoa-Way – Native macOS Wayland compositor for running Linux apps seamlessly 301 upvotes, 94 comments
  13. Improved Git Diffs with Delta, Fzf and a Little Shell Scripting 121 upvotes, 35 comments
  14. I decompiled the White House's new app 373 upvotes, 136 comments
  15. Joining databases across teams without copying data or running servers 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  16. Sealing Paper Packaging Without Adhesives 20 upvotes, 3 comments
  17. OpenCiv1 – open-source rewrite of Civ1 89 upvotes, 29 comments
  18. The first 40 months of the AI era 113 upvotes, 51 comments
  19. South Korea Mandates Solar Panels for Public Parking Lots 158 upvotes, 78 comments
  20. Private equity turned vulnerable elderly people into human ATMs 106 upvotes, 54 comments
  21. Alzheimer's disease mortality among taxi and ambulance drivers (2024) 21 upvotes, 8 comments
  22. AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice 527 upvotes, 407 comments
  23. Further human + AI + proof assistant work on Knuth's "Claude Cycles" problem 151 upvotes, 104 comments
  24. The 667MHz Machine 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Hacking old hardware by renaming to .zip [video] 103 upvotes, 78 comments
  26. TreeTrek – A raw Git repository viewer web app 8 upvotes, 2 comments
  27. Cat Itecture: Better Cat Window Boxes 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. Stop picking my Go version for me 21 upvotes, 12 comments
  29. ICAO issued new power bank restriction on flight 59 upvotes, 90 comments
  30. InpharmD (YC W21) Is Hiring – Senior Ruby on Rails Developer 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 10:00am, 29 March 2026. Source here.
